posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: Two Law Firms Threaten New York Times With Shareholder Suit Over Gaza ‘Rape’ Story & Softball ‘Investigation’ of Platner, Accuse Times of ‘Pushing False Narratives’. The shareholder suit would allege the Times’s board of failing its oversight duties by not enforcing basic editorial standards.

link_metadata.description: A growing coalition of law firms representing a New York Times Company shareholder is demanding the publisher turn over its "books and records" for an investigation "into whether the company's board has abdicated its basic oversight duties" following a string of controversial Times reports that sought to discredit Israel or support anti-Israel Democratic politicians such as Graham Platner, according to a demand letter obtained exclusively by the Washington Free Beacon.
link_metadata.title: EXCLUSIVE: Two New Law Firms Threaten New York Times With Shareholder Suit Over Gaza ‘Rape’ Story and Softball ‘Investigation’ of Platner, Accuse Times of ‘Pushing False Narratives’

posts.author: PiratePatriotParrot
posts.title: Manspreading

posts.raw_content:
Truth-seeking at all costs.

I have come to the conclusion that one of the best character traits a person can have is a persistent drive to uncover the truth... Even if that truth makes them uncomfortable. Even if it shatters everything they previously believed in. People who refuse to be lied to and who refuse to lie to themselves are some of the best people on Earth. They don't always make the right decision, but these are the people who will accept when they screwed up and become better people afterward.

I really, really admire people who can say "what I believed for years was a lie, and I am ready to start thinking and living my life differently." People should learn to become comfortable with conversations and information that could change the way you think about things.

I can't stand people who are willfully detached from reality. And I think that's why the people on the left who believe in fictional genders bother me more then anyone else on the left does. I feel like, the truth of two genders is extremely obvious. Its a truth that is so absurdly accessible that you have to be extremely delusional and anti-truth seeking in order to believe in such a ridiculous concept as "nonbinary genders."

Being unwilling to face truths that you don't want to face, telling everybody to shut up when they try to tell you the truth, changing the subject because you don't want to hear it... Claiming that it "offends you." These are some of the traits I find most contemptible in a human being. And I do not make friends with people like that because I can't stand being around them.

I want friends who are as truth seeking as possible. Those are the best friends you can have. I believe human beings are extremely prone to delusions and that we need to constantly fight our own tendency towards delusion in order to keep understanding reality as it truly is.
